_comment: Copy to .claude/settings.json in your project root. Safety Net is enforced by hooks, not by prompt assertion.
_platform_note: The hook command below uses bash. macOS/Linux/Git Bash users: keep as-is. Windows native PowerShell users: change 'command' to 'powershell -File $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/safety-net.ps1' (use the .ps1 file we ship, not .sh).

hooks._comment_platforms: bash version (macOS/Linux/Git Bash). For Windows native PowerShell, replace with: powershell -File $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/safety-net.ps1

hooks.command: echo 'mdbrain Safety Net active. Run /brain-scan to map the MD ecosystem.'

_notes.hooks: PreToolUse hook enforces Safety Net layers 1-2 and 5 programmatically. The bash version works on macOS/Linux/Git Bash; use safety-net.ps1 on native Windows PowerShell.
_notes.permissions: The deny list hard-blocks edits to protected zones even if the hook fails. The ask list forces user confirmation for destructive commands.
_notes.subagents: craft-specialist and perf-specialist are defined in .claude/agents/. Claude will delegate to them automatically based on user intent.
_notes.rules: Path-scoped rules in .claude/rules/ load automatically when Claude reads matching files (src/**, lib/**, app/**).
